name: io.github.goldentrii/novada-mcp
description: Search the web (5 engines), extract content from any URL, crawl websites, map site structure, and run multi-step research — routed through 100M+ proxy IPs across 195 countries with anti-bot bypass.

tools.name: novada_search
tools.description: Search the web via Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Yahoo, or Yandex. Returns structured results with titles, URLs, snippets. Supports time range, date filters, domain include/exclude, and geo-targeting across 195 countries.

tools.name: novada_extract
tools.description: Extract main content, title, description, and same-domain links from one or multiple URLs (batch mode). Supports markdown, text, and HTML output. Pass url=[url1,url2] for parallel batch extraction.

tools.name: novada_crawl
tools.description: Crawl a website using BFS or DFS, extract content from multiple pages concurrently. Supports select_paths and exclude_paths regex filters, plus natural-language instructions for agent-side semantic filtering.

tools.name: novada_map
tools.description: Discover all URLs on a website without extracting content. BFS link collection with path-diverse queuing, max_depth control, and optional keyword filtering. Detects JavaScript SPAs automatically.

tools.name: novada_research
tools.description: Multi-step research: generates 3-10 parallel search queries, deduplicates up to 15 unique sources, returns cited report. depth=auto|quick|deep|comprehensive. Optional focus param narrows sub-query generation.

environmentVariables.name: NOVADA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Novada API key from https://www.novada.com
